name: open-computer-use
description: Self-hosted Computer Use MCP server for desktop automation — macOS and Linux X11

interface.longDescription: An open, self-hosted Computer Use MCP server for macOS and Linux. Exposes tools for app state capture, accessibility tree inspection, mouse/keyboard actions, visual element targeting, and browser automation. Does not depend on any proprietary plugin.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the active app and summarize what's visible
Type a search query into the active field
